2008.issue: [S2008] Version 2.3.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/metric/options[1]" attribute "label" uses key "Imperial" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".
